title: Soul lock
description: A mod that lets you lock your soul to be a "god"
body:
# THIS DESCRIPTION IS NOT COMPLETE
This description is outdated and will be updated. It does not include:
- DoBanForCage gamerule
- the cage item
- debug commands
# Description
The soul lock block prevents the user from dying when they connect their soul to the block. It can stop /kill: to stop /kill you must click "respawn" "title screen" "respawn" and you will not die. There can only be one soul lock block placed at a time.
# How to Use
## Making the Soul Lock Block
![Crafting recipe for soul lock block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f06e3b928a19b2208c51899f5021d45a8133196.png)
Recipe: 4 Iron blocks, 4 Netherite blocks, 1 Player soul
## Getting a Player Soul
![The crafting recipe for the Player soul](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bb62779592d632593c2193ed1cc0404382bdbf7.png)
Recipe: 1 Nether star, 2 Dragon's breath, 2 Redstone, 2 Creeper heads, 2 Wither skeleton skulls.
This is an inactive player soul. To activate it, you must kill a player with the inactive player soul in your off hand.
## Destroying a Soul Lock Block
This will lag and kill you, however it will remove the effects from the soul lock block from the connected player making them vulnerable to death.
